query: 帮我 prepare 一下 7VUS 这个 PDB,待会要给 QM cluster 用
Run the full prep pipeline on 2QFE - i want it protonated and minimized, same as the last couple entries we did
i need to clean up this pdb 1hvr and get it ready for some docking experiments, can u add hydrogens too
我刚从rcsb下了7ZG4,能不能protonate一下然后跑个restrained minimization,生成minimized complex
can you prepare 3eml following the same flow we used on 7vuu? needs to end up minimized with ligand chemistry from ccd
prep 4XG7 end-to-end so i can feed the prepared complex into the QM cluster skill afterwards
please take 5MYH - add hydrogens with pdb2pqr+propka, do the ligand prep, recombine the complex, and run openmm minimize on it
the 6BDF pdb has a ligand called KMP, can u clean it up end-to-end so it's simulation-ready
给我按前面那套流程处理一下 7TDI,CCD里有ligand的SMILES应该能直接跑
i want to start from pdb id 4GNE and get a prepared complex ready for MD, use the standard preparation pipeline
从 design/prepared/7VUU/prepared_complex_minimized.pdb 里抽取活性位点 cluster,大约 6Å 半径,然后做 H capping 准备 QM 输入
i already have a prepared complex at design/prepared/7VUU/prepared_complex_minimized.pdb, now write me an ORCA input for a TS search at b3lyp/6-31g*
can u dock 5-nitrobenzisoxazole into 7vuu's prepared_complex_minimized.pdb using autodock vina
write me a gaussian input file for 5-NBT (5-nitrobenzotriazole) at b3lyp/6-31g* for a single point
explain to me what the 3NY ligand is in 7VUU chemically - just the chemistry, no prep needed
what's the resolution and deposit date of pdb 1abc? just metadata
fetch the canonical SMILES for the ligand with resname KMP from the PDB CCD
run a PySCF single point on this capped cluster at M06-2X/def2-TZVP, nothing else
compare the active site geometry between 7VUU and 7VUS after prep - they're both already prepared in design/prepared/
write a python script that reads a PDB file and prints out all the HETATM residue names and chains
